key_items: Bitcoin and Ethereum ETF outflows accelerate with $2.7B pulled as institutional investors rotate into XRP and Solana
Trump Media transfers 2,650 BTC (~$205M) to Crypto.com amid $455M losses, signaling potential forced selling pressure
Bitcoin rejected at 200-MA near $78K with support concerns at $76K; institutional exit narrative gaining traction
reasoning: Mixed macro signals with institutional rotation away from BTC/ETH into altcoins (XRP, SOL) combined with forced selling from Trump Media creates near-term headwinds. Positive regulatory developments (Nasdaq Bitcoin options, Georgia stablecoin adoption, potential CFTC expansion) and bullish technical catalysts (XRP accumulation, AI trading infrastructure growth) are offset by clear institutional exit pressure and technical resistance at key levels.
risks: Liquidation cascade if Bitcoin breaks below $76K support could accelerate ETF outflows and force margin calls, particularly given weak institutional conviction and the already-signaled Trump Media selling pressure.
